info.title: Review Scraper API
info.description: Review Scraper API. Scrapes product or business reviews from public review pages including Trustpilot, G2, Capterra, and any schema.org-marked review page. Returns aggregate rating, individual reviews, and sentiment breakdown. Send a JSON POST request and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, authentication, and subscriptions are handled by .

post.description: Scrapes product or business reviews from public review pages including Trustpilot, G2, Capterra, and any schema.org-marked review page. Returns aggregate rating, individual reviews, and sentiment breakdown.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.

parameters.name: X-RapidAPI-Key
parameters.description: RapidAPI application key. RapidAPI injects this for subscribed consumers.

parameters.name: X-RapidAPI-Host
parameters.description: RapidAPI host for this API listing.
